pro-mime-types.note: Lets you upload file types WordPress blocks by default (SVG, WebP variants, etc.) without editing code.

duplicate-page.note: Adds a one-click "Duplicate" action to posts and pages — great for reusing a layout you like.

family-wiki.note: Turn your site into a private family wiki with nested pages and shared editing.

wp-dashboard-notes.note: Pin sticky notes to your WordPress dashboard — handy for to-dos and reminders you'll actually see.

wordpress-beta-tester.note: Opt into WordPress beta and release-candidate builds to try new features before they ship.

static-archive.title: Static Archive
static-archive.author: Alex Kirk
static-archive.note: Export your blog as static HTML so you keep a self-contained archive even if your site changes.
